testcase.name: @AfterTest tearDown
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.remote.UnreachableBrowserException: Error communicating with the remote browser. It may have died. Build info: version: '4.5.3', revision: '4b786a1e430' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'aarch64', os.version: '12.6.1', java.version: '17.0.4.1' Driver info: se:vncEnabled: true, se:vncLocalAddress: ws://172.18.0.4:7900, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 5b99afef4238817347005a3a970431e7 at testcase.name: searchTest
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.remote.UnreachableBrowserException: Error communicating with the remote browser. It may have died.
